title: RF elements StarterDish STD-24-UM Directional parabolic dish antenna, 5GHz, 24dBi
description: The StarterDish antenna from RF Elements is a directional parabolic antenna with a gain of 24 dBi primarily intended for client installations. The antenna consists of a very light parabolic antenna, a simple holder for a mast with a diameter from 20 to 55 mm , a radiator is made of aluminum terminated on the back with a so-called IsoStation connector for direct connection to IsoStation or PrismStation units from Ubiquiti. The antenna package also includes a reducer for connection to a C5x unit… For greater compatibility, use the optional STA-SMA reducer with two RSMA female connectors for connecting units with HF connectors Ubiquiti PrismStation, IsoStation - without any converter Mimosa C5x - converter is part of the StarterDish package Antenna Holder Converter on Mimosa C5x
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH Wireless frequency 5 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 12 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 12 Antenna type Directional Antenna gain [dBi] 24 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors IsoStation port, Twist-on port (Mimosa)
